prompt:
hey, this CSV has dupes but some cells have extra spaces around them — can you clean it up? i want the deduplicated version plus a report

```
Name,Age,City
  Alice ,30, New York
Bob,25,Chicago
Alice,30,New York
  Bob  ,25,Chicago
Carol,35,  Boston
Carol,35,Boston
```

Write dedup.csv and dedup-report.md please.

expectations.text: A file named dedup.csv exists in the outputs directory
A file named dedup-report.md exists in the outputs directory
dedup.csv contains exactly 3 data rows — because whitespace-trimmed cells correctly identify the duplicates
dedup-report.md reports that exactly 3 duplicates were removed

dedup.csv preserves the original cell values from the first occurrence — the first row of data should have '  Alice ' (with leading/trailing spaces) NOT 'Alice', because trimming is only for comparison, not for output
dedup-report.md includes a table of removed rows with their original row numbers
